themes.title: Dependency Management
themes.description: Enhancing visibility and control over dependencies to improve security and performance.

themes.title: Vendor Independence
themes.description: Eliminating reliance on proprietary systems to ensure flexibility and adaptability.

milestones.name: MVP - Eliminate Vendor Lock-in
milestones.description: Complete the elimination of vendor lock-in on the proprietary transformation engine.
milestones.success_criteria: Vendor lock-in eliminated, verified by successful deployment and testing.

milestones.name: V1 - Implement Monitoring and Centralized View
milestones.description: Implement monitoring for critical CVEs and establish a centralized view of dependency health.
milestones.success_criteria: Monitoring system operational and centralized view established, validated by user feedback.

milestones.name: V2 - Enhance Dependency Health Features
milestones.description: Create a dependency health dashboard, automate CVE alerting, and implement user feedback collection.
milestones.success_criteria: Dashboard and alerting system operational, with user feedback collection in place.

sequencing.reason: V1 requires the completion of the MVP to ensure vendor lock-in is eliminated before implementing monitoring.
V2 builds on the monitoring and centralized view established in V1 to enhance dependency health features.

mvp.goal: Eliminate vendor lock-in to ensure flexibility in data transformation.

v1.goal: Implement monitoring and a centralized view for better dependency management.

v2.goal: Enhance dependency health features with dashboards and automated alerts.
